quests.name: City of Sparks
quests.description: Investigate three sites of magical disturbance throughout New Aeven and report your findings to the Archmage.

quests.name: Containment Protocol
quests.description: Destroy the animated constructs terrorizing the market district and collect their dampening crystals for Archmage Yenara.

quests.name: The Old Foundation
quests.description: Explore the ancient cisterns beneath New Aeven, fight through the Seal Wraiths, and find the source of the disturbances.

quests.name: Tremors
quests.description: Defend New Aeven from Sand Wraiths pouring through a breach in the city wall, then investigate the aftermath.

quests.name: Words of the Sealed
quests.description: Gather materials for a Resonance Lens so Archmage Yenara can decipher the ancient inscriptions beneath the city.

quests.name: Farm Pest Control
quests.description: Farmer Grace's pens are overrun with pigs, worms, and sheep. Clear out the pests and bring back proof of your work.

quests.name: What Happened Here
quests.description: The corruption has twisted the farm animals into hostile creatures. Elder Mara needs you to investigate and thin their numbers.

quests.name: The Pharaoh's Curse
quests.description: Investigate rumors of an ancient entity sealed beneath the desert pyramid. Speak to the locals, uncover the truth, and confront what lies below.

quests.name: The Obelisk Connection
quests.description: Researcher Orin has discovered that two ancient obelisks share a magical link, but the connection is broken. Travel north to find the second obelisk and restore it.

quests.name: A Ghastly Contraption
quests.description: Help Professor Oddwick clear the ghosts from his haunted house and build a device that recovers projectiles.

quests.name: Adventurer Tasks I
quests.description: The Adventurer Guide wants you to build fundamentals: train combat, cull crows, and build a gold cushion.

quests.name: Adventurer Tasks II
quests.description: The Adventurer Guide pushes you toward stronger consistency: clear enemy packs, push combat and gathering skills, train smithing, and build a serious gold reserve.

quests.name: Adventurer Tasks III
quests.description: The Adventurer Guide's third tier tests discipline across combat, farming growth, and money management.

quests.name: Campfire Supper
quests.description: The Camp Cook needs another round of fresh food for the camp. Catch shrimp, cook them, and bring the finished meal back.

quests.name: Rot Watch
quests.description: Elder Mara needs constant pressure kept on the corrupted wildlife outside the ruined village.

quests.name: Village Supply Run
quests.description: The Wise Man is rebuilding the village's emergency stores. Bring him practical supplies gathered from the nearby wilderness.

quests.name: Leather and Craft
quests.description: Learn the art of leatherworking. Tan an animal hide into leather and craft your first pair of leather gloves.

quests.name: Tools of the Trade
quests.description: Head to the Oakshore workshop, find a knife, and try your hand at fletching arrow shafts.

quests.name: A Warm Meal
quests.description: The Camp Cook wants to teach you the basics of fishing and cooking. Catch some shrimp and cook them at the fire pit.

quests.name: Forging Ahead
quests.description: The Swamp Hermit's sword is broken. He needs willow logs, slime cores, and marshbloom to repair it.

quests.name: Lobster Feast
quests.description: The Swamp Hermit needs 50 lobsters to fuel up before he can start fighting swamp creatures again.

quests.name: Lost in the Swamp
quests.description: A lost adventurer dropped his map somewhere in the swamp. Find it and bring back news of its location.

quests.name: Shell Repairs
quests.description: The Swamp Hermit's armour is in tatters. He needs snail shells to patch it up.

quests.name: Sisters of the Swamp
quests.description: Witch Hazel has lost contact with her sister in the swamp village. Find the village and speak to Witch Willow.

quests.name: The Magic Broom
quests.description: Witch Willow needs ingredients to craft a magic broom so she can fly back to her sister at the swamp entrance.

quests.name: Axe to Grind
quests.description: Lumberjack Pete wants to teach you the basics of woodcutting. Chop down some oak trees to prove your skill.

quests.name: Green Thumb
quests.description: Farmer Barley wants to teach you the basics of farming. Plant some potatoes and harvest them when they're ready.

quests.name: Rock Bottom
quests.description: Miner Mike wants to teach you the basics of mining. Mine some copper rocks to prove your skill.
